
set(
		libqhullr_HEADERS
		libqhull_r.h
		geom_r.h
		io_r.h
		mem_r.h
		merge_r.h
		poly_r.h
		qhull_ra.h
		qset_r.h
		random_r.h
		stat_r.h
		user_r.h
)
set(
		libqhullr_SOURCES
		global_r.c
		stat_r.c
		geom2_r.c
		poly2_r.c
		merge_r.c
		libqhull_r.c
		geom_r.c
		poly_r.c
		qset_r.c
		mem_r.c
		random_r.c
		usermem_r.c
		userprintf_r.c
		io_r.c
		user_r.c
		accessors_r.c
		rboxlib_r.c
		userprintf_rbox_r.c
		${libqhullr_HEADERS}
)

add_library(libqhull_r ${libqhullr_SOURCES})
